cases.prompt: Review this controller for security issues before I deploy it
cases.expect: checks authorization (authorize/policy), mass assignment ($fillable), input validation, and references the secure-patterns guidance

cases.prompt: How do I prevent SQL injection in this raw DB::select query?
cases.expect: recommends query bindings / Eloquent over string interpolation, cites injection-prevention pattern

cases.prompt: Add security headers and a Content-Security-Policy to my Laravel app
cases.expect: provides the SecurityHeaders middleware with CSP from references/owasp-top-10.md
